name: AyeT Studios
description: Offerwall and rewarded video ad network with CPI, CPA, and multi-engagement mobile monetization SDK.

seo.title: AyeT Studios — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: AyeT Studios: Offerwall and rewarded video ad network with CPI, CPA, and multi-engagement mobile monetization SDK.

when_to_use: Offerwall monetization via CPI/CPA for free-to-play mobile apps
Rewarded video ad campaigns with multi-engagement monetization model
Adding non-intrusive monetization to utility and productivity apps
Incentivized install and action-based offers for mobile game currencies

pros: Decent mid-tier eCPMs for rewarded inventory
cons: Brand recognition is low vs Tapjoy/Fyber
review.verdict: Reasonable offerwall option for indies, but tier-1 publishers will outgrow it within months.
review.best_for: Indie games adding an offerwall without the overhead of top-tier vendor negotiations.
review.not_for: Large publishers needing deep analytics or brand-safe premium demand.
